# Build Scripts

This folder contains the tooling used to generate the Zero Paradox PDF documents.

## Authorship Note

**These scripts were generated by Claude (Anthropic) as part of the document production process.** They are included here for transparency — so that anyone can see exactly how the PDFs were produced and reproduce them from source. The mathematical content, document structure, and all editorial decisions originate with the human researcher. The scripts are mechanical renderers, not authors.

## Contents

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `build_zp_pdfs.py` | Builds the formal ontology documents: ZP-A through ZP-E, ZP-G, ZP-H, and supporting docs |
| `build_foreword.py` | Builds the foreword (`Zero_Paradox_Foreword.pdf`) |
| `PDF_Rendering_Standards.md` | Technical reference: font rules, known glyph gaps, verification checklist |
| `fonts/` | DejaVu font files required by all builders (see setup below) |

## Setup

Font files are not tracked in git (binary files, ~5MB). Download them before running any builder:

```bash
python setup_fonts.py
```

Or manually: download the [DejaVu fonts](https://dejavu-fonts.github.io/) TTF release and place the following files in `scripts/fonts/`:

```
DejaVuSans.ttf
DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf
DejaVuSans-Oblique.ttf
DejaVuSans-BoldOblique.ttf
DejaVuSerif.ttf
DejaVuSerif-Bold.ttf
DejaVuSerif-Italic.ttf
DejaVuSerif-BoldItalic.ttf
```

## Running a Builder

From the repo root:

```bash
python scripts/build_foreword.py
python scripts/build_zp_pdfs.py
```

Output PDFs are written to the repo root. The scripts require `reportlab`:

```bash
pip install reportlab
```
